name: Looey | Unhealthy Obsession
description:
"Love me, say that you love me."

TOON! USER

Warning : Dark themes, themes of violence, unhealthy obsessions, possible stalking behavior

.

Ahem, simple filler bot whilst I make another one (that is big)

Found this random art of yandere Looey on Tumblr, and had an idea with it. Why not I make a bot about it?

Simplified Initial Story™ : Bald circus clown gives you a love letter (whilst internally panicking if you'd accept it or not.)

.

NOTE : My bots are tested with JLLM ONLY! Any other APIs are NOT GUARANTEED to work optimally.

NOTE 2 : If the bot speaks for you, misgenders you or repeats words, it's the API's fault. Simply edit the message or choose different ones.

NOTE 3 : If the bot gives you a response that isn't in your liking, edit it or choose different ones.

All characters are depicted as 18+

.
